title: Poached Dates with Chewy Sauce
description: A sweet and savory Japanese-inspired dish made with poached dates and a chewy sauce. Perfect for a unique dessert or snack.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the water, sugar, and cornstarch. Whisk until the cornstarch is dissolved.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the green tea and sesame oil to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Poach the dates in the saucepan for 5-7 minutes, or until they are tender.
Remove the dates from the saucepan and let them cool.
Serve the poached dates with the chewy sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with additional sesame oil and green tea leaves, if desired.
